Reepham Article 4 Direction map showing red boundary around conservation area.

agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The document defines an Article 4 Direction for the Reepham Conservation Area. Page 2 contains a clear map with a red boundary. The match at Reepham (lat: 52.76258, lon: 1.10994) was exceptionally strong with 1146 inliers and excellent scale consistency (0.97). The postcode NR7 0DU found in the text was correctly identified as the council's office location (Thorpe St Andrew) rather than the site location, which is Reepham. The boundary was successfully projected.
